mapper.insert: insert into sboard2 ( ID , APP_USER_ID , BTITLE , BCONTENT , BPASS , BFILE , BIP ) values ( sboard2_seq.nextval , #{appUserId}, #{btitle} , #{bcontent} , #{bpass} , #{bfile , jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{bip} )
mapper.select: select * from sboard2 order by id desc
SELECT * FROM sboard2 ORDER BY id DESC OFFSET #{start} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{end} ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: update sboard2 set bhit = bhit + 1 where id=#{id}
mapper.delete: delete from sboard2 where id=#{id} and bpass=#{bpass}
